nodes.label: AI as literature discovery tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary or sole discovery method
nodes.grounding_span: I did my independent process first ... it was able to provide 1 or 2 that I wasn't able to find on my own

nodes.label: AI as comprehension aid for unfamiliar topics
nodes.grounding_span: I would upload the paper to my AI assistant and ask them to provide an explanation ... I'd never take what the AI assistant said as gospel

nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative or novel code design
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools helped to generate a lot of the more mundane and repetitive parts of the code

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: AI was used extensively in cases to refine sections to be more succinct

nodes.label: AI as last resort for design tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as truly novel idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was far too reliant on the existing methods ... suggested 'new' approaches were just minimal tweaks

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as rigorous, skeptical scientific critic
nodes.grounding_span: I've found it remarkably easy to get AI to agree with me ... it's quite frustrating

nodes.label: Comprehensive literature coverage
nodes.grounding_span: contribute positively to the overall scope of my review in a purely additive way

nodes.label: Deep understanding of complex logic
nodes.grounding_span: discussing them gave me a better understanding of the inner workings

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: much shorter time than it would have otherwise taken

nodes.label: Scientific discovery and breakthrough
nodes.grounding_span: coming up with new novel ideas - the holy grail

nodes.label: Positive valuation of AI for literature screening
nodes.grounding_span: it was able to provide 1 or 2 that I wasn't able to find on my own and did contribute positively

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'd never take what the AI assistant said as gospel but by having a dialogue it often made concepts clearer

nodes.label: Positive toward AI for coding tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools helped to generate a lot of the more mundane and repetitive parts of the code

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of novelty in design
nodes.grounding_span: I found it much more productive to just brainstorm on my own as the suggestions provided lacked any true inspiration

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: it's quite frustrating ... all AIs seem to quite consistently forget rigorous scrutiny and unbiased scepticism

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: coming up with new novel ideas - the holy grail ... it would save a lot of time

nodes.label: Independent-first then AI comparison approach
nodes.grounding_span: I did my independent process first - I got to a point where I was ready to call it a job well-done on my own and then I gave the AI assistant the prompt

nodes.label: Iterative validation and clarification seeking
nodes.grounding_span: I would ask for an explanation, it would provide one, I would then use the paper itself ... to attempt to poke holes or find discrepancies
